Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description:
This plugin is in alpha — expect bugs. Please report any you find, and if you'd like to contribute, join in!

A helper for Doman Mahjong at the Gold Saucer. Two modes:

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Starts off by default. You must accept a short notice before auto-play can be turned on, and you can switch back to hints or turn it off at any time from the plugin window.
Changelog: v0.1.0.9 — Auto-play discard fix. At state-6 SelfDeclareList (the popup after every draw) the addon's main shell IS a list widget, so the dispatcher's IsListWidgetPopupActive short-circuit always fired SelectItem before the opcode-15 tile-click path could run. SelectItem against the closed-hand-as-list silently no-ops the same way opcode 7 does — every discard turn looped: decision → dispatch=Ok → suppressed-for-context (state=6 hand=14), game state never advancing. Reproduced live by a user on 2026-05-23: full findings stream showed the canonical 3-second cycle, AND the inputs telemetry showed zero FireCallback events captured for the discard attempts (because SelectItem doesn't go through FireCallback at all). Fix: at state-6, opcode 15 (tile-texture click, corpus-confirmed by 226 manual-discard records) takes priority; list-widget click path remains for non-state-6 popups (state-28 chi list, post-call discard popup at hand!=14), opcode 7 stays as the state-30 in-hand discard path. dispatch_attempted findings now carry a `path` field naming the branch the dispatcher took, so the next time a dispatch silently no-ops the corpus pins which click shape failed instead of all three returning the same uniform `Ok`.
